goal: Split monolithic app.py into separate route handler modules
context: Small Python web app with a single app.py containing all route handlers. Split user routes and health routes into separate modules for better organization.

tasks.title: Extract user routes
tasks.goal: Move list_users handler from app.py to a new src/users.py module and update app.py to import from it.

tasks.title: Extract health routes
tasks.goal: Move health_check handler from app.py to a new src/health.py module and update app.py to import from it.
